description_long: This is a handheld electric drill with a light gray, textured plastic body and a black chuck at the front for holding drill bits. The handle is ergonomically shaped with a visible trigger button for operation, and a power cord extends from the rear, indicating it is a corded model. Ventilation slots are present on both sides of the main body to prevent overheating during use. The drill features a visible brand label on one side, and the chuck currently holds a standard twist drill bit. The overall design is compact and practical, suitable for various urban tasks such as construction, repairs, or DIY projects. The surface appears slightly matte with a grippy texture for secure handling.
description: A light gray, corded electric drill with a textured grip, visible trigger, and a twist drill bit attached. It features ventilation slots and a brand label on the side.
description_view_0: The left side of the electric drill shows the textured handle, trigger button, power cord, and a brand label.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the circular chuck with the attached drill bit and the symmetrical ventilation slots on the body.
description_view_2: The right side displays another brand label, the trigger, and the ergonomic handle, with the power cord trailing behind.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the end of the handle with the power cord emerging, and the back of the drill body.
